title: Mr Meal
description:
Become a secret agentComplete most diverse missions: keep away from robots and solve logic puzzles as a newly employed secret agent. Who is Mr Meal? What is he up to?
Live in the baseAgency headquarters - this is where you live and prepare for your missions. Here you can meet other individuals and hear their stories. Explore and discover the secrets.
Explore the worldWander into three nearby towns. Check the sewers and find out what is hidden underground and in the mountains. And that mysterious abandoned town...
Be a part of communityMeeting people on your way will let you hear their stories and uncover the secrets. You can possibly cross paths with Mr Meals's staff.
Be yourselfMake doalogue choices. Collect outfits, and dress as you like.

The game is mostly based on dialogues and puzzle-arcade missions. There are also mini-games both as part of the main storyline and side activities.

-------------------------------------------Additional informationThis game contains flashing images that may make it unsuitable for people with photosensitive epilepsy or other photosensitive disorders. Please take caution.
description_short: You are newly employed agent and you work for an Agency investigating the mysterious Mr Meal. The first day you appeared in your office and right away you got your first mission: find out what is behind all Mr Meal's activities.
